---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   B.S., Industrial Engineering, Hacettepe University, Turkey, 2022 - ongoing.

# Work Experience

## Employements

1.  Türk Havacılık Uzay Sanayii A.Ş. (TUSAŞ), Candidate Engineer, 2026

2.  Trendyol Express, Warehouse Personnel, 2025

## Internships

1.  TEI Tusaş Motor Sanayii A.Ş., Intern, 2025

# Projects

# Competencies

R, Quarto, Git, Python, SQL

# Hobbies

Piano, Horse-riding

[Here, you can see my CV](cv/CV_2026)
